headline: Apple raises MacBook/iPad prices, cites memory crunch
detail: Apple is blaming a memory shortage for price increases and warns more are coming. This is a direct read-through to chip and memory suppliers — relevant to AVGO and the SMH ETF you hold. Near-term it could support semiconductor pricing, but if it signals demand destruction downstream, it is a headwind for the whole sector.

headline: Rocket Lab and Lockheed among SpaceX military space-laser partners
detail: This confirms SpaceX is landing serious defense contracts, which is modest positive color for your SPCX and SPAL positions. That said, SPCX is a brand-new IPO with limited data and SPAL is a leveraged ETF with decay — one headline does not change the risk profile on either name.

headline: Bitcoin having a tough year, traders bet it gets worse
detail: Crypto weakness often drags speculative and high-beta tech names in the same risk-off move. PLTR already has a speculative premium baked in and is your most urgent SELL flag — a broader risk-off tone makes the case for acting on that stop stronger, not weaker.
